title: hieracium aestivum subsp. conicum
intro: Hieracium aestivum subsp. conicum, also known as Hawkweed or Conical Hawkweed, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) characterized by its conical flower heads and bitter, astringent properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hieracium aestivum subsp. conicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
